snippet.title: Roger Penske Private Jet in ATLANTA
snippet.description:
Roger Searle Penske is a retired American professional auto racing driver and businessman. Penske is most known for his ownership of Team Penske, the Indianapolis Motor Speedway, IndyCar, and other auto racing-related businesses.

Worth almost $4 BILLION, he is seen here landing in his private jet in Atlanta, Georgia ahead of a NASCAR race.

snippet.title: Roger Penske Racing Private Jet
snippet.description:
#N500RP is a Roger Penske Racing team owned Gulfstream 280. Watch it land, taxi and then depart from Talladega for the Geico 500 in April 2023.

**** Elevate Your Airborne Memories With Captivating Films ****

Are you an aviation enthusiast, pilot or frequent traveler who wishes to immortalize your thrilling airplane journeys in a truly extraordinary way? Look no further! With close to a million YouTube views and an impressive portfolio that includes filming Michael Jordan's private jet and Chase Elliott's helicopter and private jet, I am here to offer you an unrivaled opportunity to transform your flight experiences into your own 4K video memory.

With my expertise as a skilled videographer and passion for aviation, I am dedicated to capturing the essence of your airborne adventures like never before. Here's why you should choose me to film your airplane flight:

I will be able to film your take off, part of your cruise and your landing in 4K quality.

Imagine having a professionally filmed and edited video of your airplane flight that you can proudly share with friends, family, and fellow aviation enthusiasts. It's not just a film; it's a tangible memory that you can revisit time and time again, preserving the magic of your journey for years to come.

Don't let your incredible airplane adventures fade into distant memories. Allow me to immortalize them through the power of film. Contact me today, and together, we'll create a cinematic masterpiece that encapsulates the thrill, beauty, and wonder of your flight like never before.

Let's soar to new heights together and transform your airborne experiences into extraordinary memories. Hire me as your dedicated aviation videographer, and let's capture the magic of your next flight in breathtaking detail.

snippet.title: Roger Penske collects 19th Indy 500 win thanks to Josef Newgarden | Motorsports on NBC
snippet.description:
Roger Penske says over the last two laps he forgot about being a track owner but says he'll "never forget" Josef Newgarden's victory in the 107th Indianapolis 500, his 19th win as a team owner. #NBCSports #IndyCar #Indy500  
» Subscribe to Motorsports on NBC: https://www.youtube.com/motorsportsonnbc?sub_confirmation=1
» Get the latest motor sports news on NBC Sports: https://www.nbcsports.com/motors
» Watch Live races on NBCSports.com: http://www.nbcsports.com/live

NBC Sports – the home of motorsports – features unparalleled motorsports programming, fueled by the network’s media rights agreements with NASCAR and IndyCar, NBC Sports has more than 1,500 hours of motor sports coverage spanning NASCAR, IndyCar, Monster Energy AMA Supercross, Pro Motocross Championship, SuperMotocross World Championship, IMSA, MotoGP, World Superbike, Nitrocross, and Dakar Rally. Subscribe to our channel for the latest motors news and highlights!

NBC Sports Group is the exclusive rights holder to every IndyCar race beginning in 2019. The new agreement is all-encompassing and includes broadcast, cable, digital, streaming and direct-to-consumer rights for all IndyCar Series races. This line-up also includes the coveted Indy 500, one of the most prestigious events in all of sports, which will be broadcast on NBC.

snippet.title: Roger Penske thinks  the road to EVs in #NASCAR’s future starts with hybrid motors.
snippet.description:
Don’t think #nascar  is going straight to electric-only power soon. Roger Penske, the owner of back-to-back Cup series champion says that hybrid technology will be adopted by the stock series before a pure EV power unit will race at the top level.
Not so clear on this audio is Roger referring to an "ICE engine" (internal combustion engine) not a "nice" engine. 
His opinion mirrors passenger vehicle sales in the U.S. where the love affair with EVs have cooled off in favor of hybrid power which does require lengthy recharging coming along with range anxiety.
@Team_Penske @NASCAR @IndyCar

localized.title: Roger Penske thinks  the road to EVs in #NASCAR’s future starts with hybrid motors.

@Team_Penske @NASCAR @IndyCar

snippet.title: Ryan Blaney: "We Gave Roger Penske Two Firsts This Year"
snippet.description:
Reflecting on his championship season, Ryan Blaney takes pride in giving Roger Penske two accomplishments he's not had before. 

Blaney gave the Hall of Fame owner half of the Memorial Day weekend sweep with the Coca-Cola 600, and delivered his first back-to-back Cup titles. 
—————
Peter Stratta
TSJ101Sports.com
Twitter: @PeterStratta

Please like, comment, and subscribe and follow along on the pages above for more at-track content!
